sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41028" key="e)pisthte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιστητ-έον</orth>, <sense id="n41028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must know</tr_>, Sch.D.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.316H.</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.207</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
